Taraori Basmati in Panipat (Haryana) during 2002-04 in 160 ha. • Conservation of natural enemies: Enhancement in population of spiders, ranged .88 to . adults/hill in IPM against .02 to .89 adults/ hill in FP. • Enhancement in population (.- times) of antagonistic fungi (Trichoderma Spp.) and bacteria (Pseudomonas fluorescens) in soil. • Reduction in chemical pesticide residue in grains (below maximum residue level), acceptable in national and international market.
